lines: Move to the beat, {player}! Can you jump and spin?
Your body is a dancing flame. Let's move together!
no_quest_line: You've got the rhythm in your heart, {player}!
quest_offer_line: The fire-drums are beating! Will you dance with me, {player}?
quest_progress_line: Jump! Spin! Clap! You're a great dancer, {player}!
quest_complete_line: What a performance! You've got so much energy and grace, {player}.
